payload.answer: Committed: Cognee is rebuildable/derived; Brain DB is the source of truth.
payload.decision: Store operating principle for Brain/Cognee relationship; establish Brain DB as source of truth and treat Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection.

entity_resolution.reason: Entities appear unambiguous from the provided conclusion; no existing IDs supplied.

memory_cards.statement: Brain should treat Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection, while Brain DB remains the source of truth.

details: Stored one policy-level memory card capturing the Brain↔Cognee↔Brain DB relationship.

repair_options: If later evidence contradicts this mapping, update the policy card to reflect the new authoritative source.
If Cognee is found to be partially authoritative, split the policy into per-field or per-data-type authority rules.
